recent_merged_highlights.title: fix(assistant-api): align patch defaults with entity schema
feat(model-selector-v2): build v2 model selector on new data/UI stack
♻️ refactor(agents-data-api): migrate agents domain to DataApi — remove BaseService, database/ shims
feat(data): add domain hooks for models/providers and batch model API
refactor(code): redesign Code Tools page with tool grid and drawer UI
feat: migrate agents storage to v2 main database
refactor: stabilize ui package boundaries and theme contracts
refactor(settings): unify settings list item and action button patterns
refactor(v2): remove local web search backend
refactor(data-api): use greedy :uniqueModelId* for model route
feat(data): add Tag entity DataApi with CRUD and entity-tag associations
feat(migration): migrate llm model preferences to v2 with UniqueModelId format
refactor(data): unify legacy model ID conversion and add FK references to user_model
refactor: remove memory module from v2
refactor: migrate shortcut system to Preference architecture
